selected_title: A RESEARCH PROGRESS OF CORPORATE ABSORPTIVE CAPACITY
question: Where does “A RESEARCH PROGRESS OF CORPORATE ABSORPTIVE CAPACITY” support or contradict the causal account advanced by “Theoretical Review of Absorptive Capacity”?

evidence_spans.text: Absorptive capacity has become an internationally emerging academic area since Cohen and Levinthal's pioneering research on absorptive capacity in 1990.In this paper,we review the literature related to absorptive capacity over the past two decades and summarize the connotation,dimension structure and function mechanism of absorptive capacity.We further propose a rational and convincing mechanism model based on an observation of four popular mechanism models on absorptive capacity.Finally,future research directions are suggested.

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Absorptive capacity, Connotation through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 69 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
